posts.content: comfyui_LLM_party: LLM Agent Framework in ComfyUI includes MCP sever, Omost,GPT-sovits, ChatTTS,GOT-OCR2.0, and FLUX prompt nodes,access to Feishu,discord,and adapts to all llms with similar openai / aisuite interfaces, such as o1,ollama, gemini, grok, qwen, GLM, deepseek, kimi,doubao. Adapted to local llms, vlm, gguf such as llama-3.3 Janus-Pro, Linkage graphRAG

ai.title: comfyui_LLM_party: LLM Agent Framework integrating MCP, Omost, FLUX prompts, o1/ollama/gemini
ai.summary: ComfyUI extension framework that integrates multiple LLM interfaces (o1, ollama, gemini, qwen, deepseek) with MCP server, FLUX prompt nodes, and graphRAG linkage. Supports local LLMs and VLM models like llama-3.3 and Janus-Pro with GGUF format.
ai.why_important: Enables ComfyUI users to leverage multiple LLM backends and local models for prompt engineering and 3D/image generation workflows without vendor lock-in.
ai.learnings: Shows practical integration pattern for connecting ComfyUI with diverse LLM APIs (OpenAI-compatible interfaces) and local models, including graphRAG for knowledge retrieval.

posts.content: Toonflow-app: Toonflow 是开源一站式 AI 短剧创作工具，将小说、剧本快速转化为动画短剧。集成 AI 编剧、智能分镜、角色与视频生成，跨平台桌面端轻量部署，助力创作者低成本批量产出视觉内容。Toonflow is an open-source AI tool that turns stories and scripts into animated short dramas. Features AI scriptwriting, storyboarding, character and video generation. A cross-platform desktop app for efficient content creation.

ai.title: Toonflow: 开源一站式AI短剧创作工具，小说/剧本转动画短剧，含AI编剧、智能分镜、角色与视频生成
ai.summary: 开源桌面应用，将小说或剧本转化为动画短剧，集成AI编剧、智能分镜、角色生成和视频生成功能。跨平台轻量部署，支持批量内容产出。
ai.why_important: 为创作者提供从剧本到成片的完整AI动画制作流程，降低动画短剧制作门槛和成本。
ai.learnings: 演示了AI驱动的完整动画制作管线：从文本到分镜、角色设计再到视频输出的自动化工作流程。

posts.content: onlook: The Cursor for Designers • An Open-Source AI-First Design tool • Visually build, style, and edit your React App with AI

ai.title: Onlook: Open-Source AI-First Design tool for React - Visually build and edit with AI
ai.summary: Open-source AI-first design tool positioned as 'Cursor for Designers'. Enables visual building, styling, and editing of React apps with AI assistance.
ai.why_important: Bridges the gap between visual design and React development with AI-powered design-to-code capabilities in an open-source package.
ai.learnings: Demonstrates AI-assisted visual editing workflow for React components, potentially reducing handoff friction between design and development.

posts.content: spritefusion-pixel-snapper: A tool to snap pixels to a perfect grid. Designed to fix messy and inconsistent pixel art generated by AI.

ai.title: Spritefusion Pixel Snapper: Tool to snap pixels to perfect grid, fixes messy AI-generated pixel art
ai.summary: Tool designed to fix inconsistent and messy pixel art generated by AI by snapping pixels to a perfect grid. Addresses common quality issues in AI-generated pixel graphics.
ai.why_important: Solves a specific pain point in AI pixel art workflows where generated output lacks the precision required for actual game/design use.
ai.learnings: Demonstrates post-processing approach to clean up AI-generated pixel art, ensuring grid-aligned output suitable for production use.

posts.content: pixel2motion: AI logo animation skill: turn raster logos into smooth SVG animation, animated HTML demos, GIF/video previews, and motion QA evidence.

ai.title: pixel2motion: AI logo animation - turn raster logos into SVG animation with HTML demos, GIF/video previews
ai.summary: AI-powered tool that converts raster logos into smooth SVG animations, generating animated HTML demos, GIF/video previews, and motion QA evidence. Automates logo animation production workflow.
ai.why_important: Automates the typically manual process of logo animation creation, from vectorization to motion design and export in multiple formats.
ai.learnings: Shows end-to-end automation of logo animation: raster input → SVG conversion → motion applied → multi-format output with QA artifacts.

posts.content: short-video-factory: 一键生成产品营销与泛内容短视频，AI批量自动剪辑，高颜值跨平台桌面端工具 One click generation of product marketing and general content short videos, AI batch automatic cliping, beautiful cross platform desktop tool

ai.title: short-video-factory: 一键生成营销短视频，AI批量自动剪辑，跨平台桌面工具
ai.summary: 跨平台桌面应用，支持一键生成产品营销和泛内容短视频，具备AI批量自动剪辑功能。面向批量视频内容生产场景。
ai.why_important: 针对营销视频批量生产需求，提供自动化剪辑工作流，提升短视频制作效率。
ai.learnings: 展示了AI驱动的批量视频剪辑自动化方案，可用于营销内容规模化生产。
